node.statement: Step A (Setup). Under the Sampling-grid and Bandlimit definitions, the SU(2) Fourier coefficient f-hat(l)_{mn} is exactly approximated by the Direct-DFT-SU2 sum: a triple sum over j1, k, j2 of f * conj(t^l_{nm}) * sin(theta_k) * (constant). This sets the object to be computed (paper line 695).
